title: Counselor Enrollment & Delivery Checklist
subtitle: Coaching · IELTS Academic · Crash / intensive batch
footerTagline: Future Link Consultants | 25+ Years in Study Abroad & Test Prep | IELTS · PTE · GRE · GMAT · German · French · Spoken English
policyBanner: Crash course = intensive pace. Confirm realistic target band vs diagnostic and exam deadline. Academic module only. Exam fee is separate (paid to IDP IELTS India on ieltsidpindia.com). Never guarantee a band score.

items.title: Diagnostic completed — gap to target ≤ 1.0 band overall (or skill-specific retake)
items.note: Do not enroll diagnostic 5.0 targeting 7.0 in crash.

items.title: Exam deadline documented — batch length fits timeline
Enrollment agreement signed — crash pace explained
Course fee collected (separate from IDP exam fee)
Crash batch assigned — daily / intensive schedule shared
Materials issued per branch policy and logged
Trainer briefed on deadline and weakest skill
Speaking mocks at least twice per week
Mid-course checkpoint — adjust or pause if off track
Minimum 2 full mocks under exam conditions
Latest mock within 0.5 band of target before booking
Hand off to admissions / visa if target met
Booster or retake plan if below target
